notes: Official DJI Authorized Dealer. Est. 2012. Operates physical stores in Tokyo (Toranomon) and Yokohama. Sales network of ~300 partners across Japan. Hosts DJI Dock 3 demonstrations.

company_name: System5 (株式会社システムファイブ)
notes: Official DJI Distributor. Began handling Dock 3 in Feb 2025. 3 consecutive years top sales in Japan. Nationwide dealer network. HQ: Chiyoda Ward, Tokyo.
Bronze Solutions Partner. Provides DJI Dock-compatible remote control platform (FlytBase integration). Active demonstrations at Japan Drone 2024. DJI Dock rental/integration consulting.

company_name: AfterFIT (株式会社アフターフィット)
notes: Renewable energy company. Operates at 1,924KW solar plant in Tochigi Prefecture. First in Japan with BVLOS night flights approval. Uses DJI drones + Heisha drone dock. Operational since 2022.

company_name: JDRONE (株式会社ジェイドローン)
notes: Tokyo-based cargo drone operator. DJI Dock 3 deployment consulting and operational support. Deployed at Nozawa Onsen Ski Resort. Cargo service since Aug 2024. Search and rescue applications.
Official DJI Authorized Distributor. Offers Dock 2 and Dock 3 bundles with drones. DJI Dock 3 training center established at T-MIB Drone Field (Jan 2026). Robotics company division.
Official DJI Authorized Dealer. Promotes DJI Dock 2 and 3. Focus on easy installation and automation capabilities. Limited online presence.

company_name: Drone Business Laboratory (ドローンビジネスラボラトリー/D-Lab)
notes: Drone training school (est. 2019). Multiple bases: Kurashiki, Tokyo, Ishioka, Ibaraki. Conducted DJI Dock 3 demonstration seminars. Focuses on Level 3/3.5 flight operations.

company_name: HOVERING (ドローンショップ HOVERING ONLINE)
notes: DJI Authorized Enterprise Retailer. Carries Dock 2 and 3 products. Online shop focused on industrial drone solutions. DJI Care Enterprise Plus available.

company_name: Drone Station (ドローンステーション)
notes: Official DJI Partner. Lists DJI Dock 2 in product catalog. Online sales focused. Limited product information available.

company_name: DJI Japan (DJI JAPAN 株式会社)
notes: Official DJI subsidiary in Japan. HQ: Trade Pia Odaiba 9F, Minato-ku, Tokyo. Sales: sales.jp@dji.com. Announces product launches and maintains DJI dealer network.
Ski resort in Nagano. Operates DJI Dock 3 with Matrice 4D/4TD for avalanche detection and terrain monitoring. 24/7 autonomous operations in extreme weather. Emergency response applications.
Third-party software platform compatible with DJI Dock. Used by AfterFIT for BVLOS operations. Helps obtain JCAB certifications in Japan. Operational support for Japanese enterprises.
OEM drone dock provider. AfterFIT used Heisha Drone Nest (compatible with DJI aircraft) alongside DJI drones. D-series docks for M300/M350/M400. Not Japan-based but deployed in Japan.
